Products

Henna essentials designed for deep, even stain.

Each blend is crafted fresh and shipped fast, so your designs stay rich and vibrant.

Preservation: All henna cones should be stored in a deep freezer for best results.
Signature 120 BDT

Special Regular Cone

Made with BAQ luxury henna powder and eucalyptus oil. Gives a red-to-brown stain; keep on skin for 4 hours for best results.

25 gm Deep-freeze required

Premium 160 BDT

Premium Cone

Made with lavender oil and luxury BAQ henna powder. Gives a maroon-dark color; lavender aroma is soothing and the paste is smooth.

25 gm Deep-freeze required
Request Order
Premium 120 BDT

Premium Nail Tint

Made with tea extract and wheat flour. Apply for 6 hours for a deep maroon stain. For beautiful henna-stained nails.

15 gm Deep-freeze required

Herbal Hair Pack

Natural herb blend for strong, healthy hair. Supports thicker, shinier hair and a healthy scalp.

Herbal Hair Care with Henna Never Before

The power of natural herbs for strong, healthy hair.

What makes it special

Our Herbal Hair Pack is crafted from traditional herbs trusted for generations.

  • Henna Powder � strengthens roots, adds shine, and conditions hair.
  • Rosemary � supports hair growth and scalp circulation.
  • Fenugreek (Methi) � reduces hair fall and nourishes follicles.

Benefits

  • Helps reduce hair fall
  • Strengthens weak hair roots
  • Improves hair thickness
  • Adds natural shine and softness
  • Supports a healthy scalp

Weight: 100 gm

How to use

  1. Take the required amount of herbal powder.
  2. Mix with warm water to make a smooth paste.
  3. Apply evenly on scalp and hair.
  4. Leave for 30�45 minutes.
  5. Rinse with water.
  6. For best results, use once a week.

Need a bulk order?

We create tailored blends and prioritize studio schedules.
